title: Navigate to credit cards section and view available card list
steps: Navigate to https://ecommerce-playground.lambdatest.io/
Locate and click the Credit Cards navigation link
Verify the credit cards listing page loads
Verify multiple card tiles are visible on the page
expected_result: A list of available American Express credit cards is displayed with card tiles and filter options visible
kane_objective: User can navigate to the credit cards section of amex.com and view a list of available credit cards
source_description: User can navigate to the credit cards section of amex.com and view a list of available credit cards

title: Filter credit cards by category (rewards, travel, cashback)
steps: Navigate to https://ecommerce-playground.lambdatest.io/
Go to the credit cards section
Locate filter chips such as Travel, Cash Back, or Rewards
Click a filter chip
Verify the card list updates to show filtered results
expected_result: Filtered credit card results are displayed below the filter chips after applying a filter
kane_objective: User can use filters (e.g., rewards, travel, cashback) to refine results
source_description: User can use filters (e.g., rewards, travel, cashback) to refine results

title: Click a credit card to view details including benefits, fees, and rewards
steps: Navigate to https://ecommerce-playground.lambdatest.io/
Go to the credit cards section
Click on any credit card tile or View Details link
Verify the card detail page loads
Verify benefits, annual fee, and rewards information is visible
expected_result: Card detail page is displayed showing benefits, annual fee, and rewards or points information
kane_objective: User can click on a credit card to view details (benefits, fees, rewards)
source_description: User can click on a credit card to view details (benefits, fees, rewards)

title: View card highlights and comparison without logging in
steps: Navigate to https://ecommerce-playground.lambdatest.io/ without logging in
Go to the credit cards section
Verify card highlights or comparison section is visible
Verify no login prompt blocks the content
expected_result: Card highlights and featured benefits are visible on the credit cards page without requiring login
kane_objective: User can see clear card comparison or highlights without logging in
source_description: User can see clear card comparison or highlights without logging in

title: Search results are relevant to selected filters or criteria
steps: Navigate to https://ecommerce-playground.lambdatest.io/
Go to the credit cards section
Apply a filter such as Travel
Verify the displayed cards are relevant to the selected filter
Check that card descriptions or labels match the filter category
expected_result: Cards shown after applying a filter are relevant to the selected category, such as travel cards appearing when the Travel filter is applied
kane_objective: User receives relevant results based on selected filters or search criteria
